message:
feat: Auto-enable all MoE optimizations on startup

All four optimizations are now automatically enabled when using MoE inference:

1. Static Pinning - Loads expert profile (or defaults to [0,4,2,6])
2. Shadow Router - Loads all 32 routers (~4MB) for 2-layer lookahead
3. Oracle Prefetch - Already automatic in moeFFN_Q8_Batched
4. Dynamic Top-1 - Already enabled by default (turbo_mode = true)

New methods in moe_metal.zig:
- autoInitOptimizations() - Full initialization with GGUF loader
- autoInitPinning() - Quick pinning without shadow routers

Integration in moe_inference.zig:
- Calls autoInitOptimizations() after Metal engine init
- Automatically pins hot experts based on profile
- Loads shadow routers for predictive pipelining
- Logs summary of enabled optimizations

Usage is now automatic - just run MoE inference and all optimizations
are enabled for 30+ tok/s on 16GB systems.
